headline: FICO Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: William Lansing: Thanks, Dave, and thank you, everyone, for joining us for our fourth quarter earnings call.  As shown on Page 2 of the fourth quarter financial highlights, we reported Q4 revenues of $516 million, up 14% over last year.  In our Software segment, we delivered $204 million in Q4 revenues.

raw.headline: FICO Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript

headline: Equifax Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) reported what CEO Mark Begor called a “very strong” start to 2026, driven by outperformance in U.S. mortgage and continued momentum in Workforce Solutions, while keeping its full-year outlook unchanged amid heightened macro and interest-rate uncertainty tied to the Iran conflict.

headline: Your credit card's 0% intro APR is ending soon. How to avoid a costly surprise.
summary: A 0% APR credit card can help you pay down debt without interest. Here's how to make the most of it, and what to do if you're still paying your balance when the intro period ends.

headline: Erste Group FICO Award Spotlights Fair Isaac Valuation And Adoption Story
summary: Erste Group Bank AG has adopted Fair Isaac's FICO optimization technology to refine pricing and lending decisions. The bank's project received the 2026 FICO Decision Award for AI, Machine Learning & Optimization, recognizing measurable gains in customer outcomes and efficiency. This deployment highlights wider use of FICO's advanced analytics tools by a major European banking group. For investors watching Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO), this award highlights real world use of its optimization...
